case_title: PATEL, CHARLIE B vs. CHAVEZ, TONY et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $105.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, CHARLIE B AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, TONY
